_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time serving, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, and shadow deployments, and the infrastructure requirements and failure modes of each.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-023 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.507), AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.493).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.452). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, mission, required] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, batch, canary, deployment, deployments, edge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.927, R=0.821). P exceeds R by 0.106 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of mission required capabilities." and "Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.511 > STS 0.452 (gap +0.059). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, mission, required]. WIDAI-only: [b, batch, canary, deployment, deployments, edge].
